text.title: Internationalization Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns observed when applying internationalization. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix keyed to the methodology.

antipattern.symptom: Translator delivers Spanish locale; product still shows English buttons in 8 places.
antipattern.root-cause: Author bypassed catalogue 'just this once' for hotfix strings.
antipattern.fix: Add lint rule that fails CI on string literals in JSX/templates. Sweep existing leaks with codemod.

antipattern.symptom: Russian translation renders 'У вас есть 2 яблок' instead of '2 яблока' because plural was concatenated.
antipattern.root-cause: Author used 'You have ' + count + ' apples' pattern.
antipattern.fix: Refactor to ICU MessageFormat with plural rule. Russian catalogue gets one/few/many/other forms.

antipattern.symptom: German locale shows '1.000,50 €' as '1,000.50 €' because manual format used '.' decimal separator.
Arabic locale renders with left-aligned text and arrows pointing the wrong direction.
antipattern.root-cause: CSS used left/right; no logical properties.
antipattern.fix: Migrate to logical properties (margin-inline-start, text-align: start). Audit icons that have direction (arrows): use SVG with mirroring or paired LTR/RTL versions.
